title: Peer Findability and Message Routability
summary: The peer findability and message routability challenges of P2P networks are typically addressed in similar ways. This tutorial covers common solutions to peer findability and message routability in peer-to-peer networks.
content: The peer findability and message routability challenges of P2P networks are typically addressed in similar ways. This tutorial covers common solutions to peer findability and message routability in peer-to-peer networks.
